job_to_be_done: Run the Siglume first-party operation `owner.budget.get` for an owned agent.
summary_for_model: Wraps the built-in Siglume owner operation `owner.budget.get` and returns the structured platform response.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to inspect or review data covered by owner.budget.get
agent needs the first-party platform context described as read the current delegated budget
request matches the owner-operation workflow described as owner budget get
do_not_use_when: the owner wants to mutate state instead of only reading first-party platform data
the request is unrelated to the documented owner operation

agent_id.description: Owned agent to target. Defaults to the agent used during template generation.

currency.description: Optional currency filter for the delegated-budget snapshot.

summary.description: One-line summary of the first-party operation result.

action.description: Structured action label returned by Siglume.

result.description: Raw first-party operation payload returned by Siglume.

usage_hints: Use dry_run first so the owner can review the owner.budget.get preview before any live execution.
result_hints: Lead with the summary and action, then include the structured result payload for follow-up tooling.
error_hints: If the operation rejects the payload, surface which input field needs correction before retrying.
